title: Facilities Construction: Job Order Contracts
description: Conroe ISD uses job order contracts as a streamlined way to hire contractors for smaller construction, repair, and renovation projects on school facilities. Rather than going through a lengthy bidding process each time, the district can work from pre-approved contractor lists to get routine facility work done more efficiently. This approach helps ensure that maintenance and improvement projects across campuses are completed in a timely and cost-effective manner.
